data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T07:38 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,

content.thinking:
All children of this patrol wisp are already completed (✓). This means the previous patrol cycle finished. I need to squash this wisp and create a new patrol.

Let me check `bd mol current` to confirm there's no remaining step.

content.text: All steps of the current patrol wisp are complete. Squashing and starting a new cycle.
